# Seeqr LLM Configuration File
# https://tryseeqr.vercel.app/llms.txt
# For AI models and language models

Model-Access: true
Model-Accessibility: Encouraged
Purpose: QR code detection, phishing detection, API documentation

## About Seeqr
Name: Seeqr
Tagline: Privacy-first QR code scanner with AI-powered phishing detection
Website: https://tryseeqr.vercel.app
Status: Active Development (v1.0+)

## API Documentation
API-Base-URL: https://api.seeqr.io/v1
API-Docs: https://api.seeqr.io/docs
API-OpenAPI-Spec: https://api.seeqr.io/openapi.json (future)

## Quick Start
```bash
# Web App
Visit https://tryseeqr.vercel.app and upload an image

# NPM Package (Free)
npm install seeqr
import { scanQR } from 'seeqr';
const result = await scanQR(file);

# NPM Package (Pro)
npm install seeqr-pro
import { scanQRWithSafety } from 'seeqr-pro';
const result = await scanQRWithSafety(file, {
  checkPhishing: true,
  realTimeReputation: true
});

# REST API
curl -X POST https://api.seeqr.io/v1/scan \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "image_base64": "...",
    "include_safety": true
  }'
```

## Endpoint Reference

### Scan QR Code
```
POST /v1/scan
Content-Type: application/json

Request:
{
  "image_base64": "base64-encoded image",
  "include_safety": true,
  "include_metadata": false
}

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "qr_code": {
    "raw_data": "https://example.com",
    "url": "https://example.com",
    "type": "url"
  },
  "safety": {
    "is_safe": true,
    "risk_level": "low",
    "phishing_probability": 0.02,
    "malware_detected": false,
    "warnings": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "scan_time_ms": 245,
    "image_size_bytes": 125000,
    "qr_version": 10
  }
}
```

### Check URL Safety
```
POST /v1/safety/check
Content-Type: application/json

Request:
{
  "url": "https://example.com"
}

Response:
{
  "url": "https://example.com",
  "is_safe": true,
  "risk_level": "low",
  "risk_score": 5,
  "threats": [],
  "confidence": 0.98
}
```

## Authentication
Method: API Key (Bearer token)
Header: Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
Get-Key: https://dashboard.seeqr.io/api-keys

## Rate Limits
Free Tier: 100 scans/month
Starter: 10,000 scans/month
Pro: 100,000 scans/month
Business: 1,000,000 scans/month
Enterprise: Unlimited

Rate-Limit-Headers:
  X-RateLimit-Limit: requests per period
  X-RateLimit-Remaining: requests remaining
  X-RateLimit-Reset: reset timestamp

## Error Codes
```
200 OK - Successful scan
400 Bad Request - Invalid image or parameters
401 Unauthorized - Invalid API key
429 Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded
500 Internal Server Error - Server error
503 Service Unavailable - Maintenance
```

## SDKs & Libraries

### JavaScript/TypeScript
```bash
npm install seeqr
npm install seeqr-pro  # With safety layer
```

### Python (Planned)
```bash
pip install seeqr
```

### Go (Planned)
```bash
go get github.com/seeqr/go-sdk
```

### Rust (Planned)
```toml
[dependencies]
seeqr = "0.1"
```

## Use Cases

1. **E-Commerce**: Scan product QR codes for inventory tracking
2. **Healthcare**: Verify patient information QR codes
3. **Finance**: Check payment QR codes for phishing
4. **Logistics**: Track shipment QR codes
5. **Security**: Audit QR codes for threats
6. **Mobile Apps**: Add QR scanning to your app
7. **Accessibility**: Help visually-impaired users
8. **Analytics**: Track QR code usage patterns

## Safety Features

### Phishing Detection
Detects:
- Typosquatting attacks (amaz0n.com)
- Unicode/Punycode abuse
- Suspicious domain patterns
- Very new domains (registered <7 days ago)
- Missing SSL certificates

### Malware Detection
Checks:
- VirusTotal database
- URLhaus database
- Known malware signatures
- Suspicious file types

### Domain Validation
Verifies:
- Domain registration age
- WHOIS privacy status
- SSL certificate validity
- DNS records
- Domain reputation history

## Pricing

Free: $0/month
- 100 scans/month
- Web UI only
- Community support

Starter: $49/month
- 10,000 scans/month
- REST API access
- Basic safety layer
- Email support

Pro: $149/month
- 100,000 scans/month
- Full safety layer
- Analytics dashboard
- Priority support

Business: $499/month
- 1,000,000 scans/month
- Custom safety rules
- Dedicated Slack channel
- 99.9% SLA

Enterprise: Custom
- Unlimited scans
- Self-hosted option
- White-label solution
- 99.99% SLA

## Changelog

v1.0.0 (Current)
- Initial release
- QR code detection
- Basic safety layer
- Web UI
- Free tier

v1.1.0 (Planned)
- Image preview
- Multiple QR detection
- History feature
- PWA installation

v2.0.0 (Planned)
- Camera capture
- Advanced phishing detection
- QR code generation
- Dark mode
- Multi-language support
